# Cross-listing portrait_sets for gk_traits.
# Auto-generated by tools/build_gate_lists.py --emit-crosslist-sets.
# Each set surfaces a portrait inside a different phenotype's empire
# designer dropdown, gated by the appropriate DLC triggers.

gk_inf_as_art = {
	species_class = ART
	conditional_portraits = {
		randomizable = {
			has_infernals = yes
		}
		playable = {
			has_infernals = yes
		}
		portraits = {
			"inf1"
		}
	}
}

gk_fun_hum_rep_as_inf = {
	species_class = INF
	conditional_portraits = {
		randomizable = {
			has_infernals = yes
		}
		playable = {
			has_infernals = yes
		}
		portraits = {
			"fun13"
			"humanoid_hp_01"
			"rep17"
		}
	}
}

gk_tox_as_inf = {
	species_class = INF
	conditional_portraits = {
		randomizable = {
			has_toxoids = yes
			has_infernals = yes
		}
		playable = {
			has_toxoids = yes
			has_infernals = yes
		}
		portraits = {
			"tox9"
		}
	}
}

gk_inf_as_lithoid = {
	species_class = LITHOID
	conditional_portraits = {
		randomizable = {
			has_infernals = yes
			has_lithoids = yes
		}
		playable = {
			has_infernals = yes
			has_lithoids = yes
		}
		portraits = {
			"inf6"
		}
	}
}

gk_lithoid_as_plant = {
	species_class = PLANT
	conditional_portraits = {
		randomizable = {
			has_lithoids = yes
			host_has_dlc = "Plantoids Species Pack"
		}
		playable = {
			has_lithoids = yes
			host_has_dlc = "Plantoids Species Pack"
		}
		portraits = {
			"lith6"
			"lith8"
		}
	}
}

gk_inf_as_rep = {
	species_class = REP
	conditional_portraits = {
		randomizable = {
			has_infernals = yes
		}
		playable = {
			has_infernals = yes
		}
		portraits = {
			"inf2"
			"inf3"
			"inf7"
		}
	}
}

gk_inf_as_tox = {
	species_class = TOX
	conditional_portraits = {
		randomizable = {
			has_infernals = yes
			has_toxoids = yes
		}
		playable = {
			has_infernals = yes
			has_toxoids = yes
		}
		portraits = {
			"inf10"
		}
	}
}
